description: Goal: source publication mutates scope only for scope-shaping reasons. Signal: source_publish no longer walks inside ordinary function do-bodies; item macro fragments, module/protocol discovery, and scope threading still work; no source-publication path blocks on body-local macro readiness for an undemanded function. Strategy: collapse source publication to reserve, bind, and publish raw definition facts; keep item-level expansion in place because it can create sibling definitions; delete the eager function-body traversal and waits from the publication layer.
title: Compiler2 source publication: keep item-level expansion eager but delete eager function-body expansion
